title: DSC 106 Lab 1 — Multi-page portfolio
description: Semantic HTML site with CV, contact mailto form, and relative navigation across Home, Projects, Contact, and CV.

title: DSC 106 Lab 2 — Layout and theming
description: CSS max-width layout, flex navigation, grid + subgrid contact form, and responsive project cards with OKLCH colors.

title: DSC 106 Lab 3 — Client-side navigation
description: Modular JS builds the nav from data, handles GitHub Pages base paths, theme persistence with localStorage, and improved mailto encoding.

title: DSC 106 Lab 4 — Data-driven projects
description: JSON-backed project list with reusable renderProjects(), homepage preview slice, and GitHub REST API profile stats.

title: CSE 151B — Deep learning baseline
description: Trained and compared convolutional baselines on a course benchmark with learning-rate schedules and error analysis write-up.

title: DSC 80 — Principles of data science
description: End-to-end pandas pipeline from raw tables to reproducible figures and narrative summary for a policy-style question.

title: COGS 9 — Data and models mini-project
description: Surveyed a public dataset, articulated assumptions, and communicated limitations of a simple predictive sketch.

title: DSC 10 — Foundations of data science
description: Tables, sampling, and simulation labs culminating in a small group report on uncertainty in estimates.

title: Personal — Anime watchlist tracker
description: Spreadsheet-backed tracker for seasons watched, ratings, and notes; exports CSV for archival.

title: Personal — Course schedule optimizer
description: Constraint checklist for prerequisites and time blocks; helped compare two major plans before enrollment.

title: Kaggle-style — Tabular playground notebook
description: Exploratory notebook with validation split, simple tree model, and leaderboard-style metric tracking.

title: Club — Workshop slides: Git basics
description: Short slide deck and live demo covering clone, branch, commit, and PR flow for first-time contributors.
